name: SBI Cashback Credit Card
additionalBenefits: 5% cashback on online spends without merchant restriction
1% fuel surcharge waiver across petrol pumps in India on fuel transactions from Rs 500 to Rs 3,000, capped at Rs 100 per billing statement
additionalDetails: Cashback is auto-credited to the SBI Card account within two working days of statement generation.
internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-02
Cashback is accrued on transaction posting or settlement date, not transaction initiation date.
Cashback is auto-credited to the SBI Card account within two working days of statement generation.
Cashback does not expire because it is adjusted automatically in the next statement after credit.
Effective 1 April 2026, maximum cashback per statement cycle is Rs 4,000, with online cashback capped at Rs 2,000 and offline cashback capped at Rs 2,000.
Effective 1 April 2026, cashback is not applicable on spends at digital gaming platforms or merchants, tolls, and government-related transactions, in addition to existing exclusions.
April 2026 notice lists MCCs 7993, 7994 and 5816 for digital gaming platforms or merchants; 4784 for tolls; and 9222, 9311 and 9402 for government-related transactions.
